title: Capability Outcome
description: Structured outcome record reported after a capability is invoked. Replaces fragile rationale string parsing. Must not count the word 'success' inside a failure context as success.

capability_id.description: Identifier of the capability that was invoked.

outcome.description: The invocation outcome. 'success' = worked as expected; 'partial' = worked but with issues; 'failure' = did not produce expected result; 'contract_failure' = input/output contract was violated.

task_description.description: What task Hermes was trying to accomplish with this capability.

cost_estimate.description: Optional cost estimate or token usage notes.

error_class.description: Optional error classification for failures: timeout, schema_mismatch, rate_limit, unexpected_output, internal_error, etc.

operator_notes.description: Optional human-readable notes from the operator about this outcome.

reported_by.description: Who or what reported this outcome: operator id, 'hermes', or system component.

reported_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this outcome was reported.
